manifest.label: Agent Tools Copilot Canary
manifest.description: Copilot proposal canary demonstrating M10 agent tools that read TimelineSnapshot, return proposal rationale/explanation with affected objects and source-to-output refs, and demonstrate replaceForSource by replacing prior pending suggestions from the same tool source.

contributions.label: Copilot Analyze
contributions.description: Reads TimelineSnapshot and returns a detailed analysis with source-to-output refs.

contributions.label: Copilot Suggest
contributions.description: Reads TimelineSnapshot and returns mutation/proposal results with patches, affected object IDs, and source-to-output refs. Uses a stable source identifier so repeated calls replace prior pending proposals (replaceForSource).

messages.activation.ready: Agent Tools Copilot Canary ready with analyze and suggest tools registered.
